name: Karen Murphy
ai_summary: Retiree with post-secondary education returning to workforce, with prior childcare experience at a learning center working with infants/toddlers. Located in McDonough, GA with a 15-mile drive and flexible availability; highlights dependability, loyalty, and teamwork as key strengths for up kid.

transcripts.q3:
Hi, my name is Karen Murphy. I Am A retiree returning to the workforce. I majored, in post-secondary education when I was in college, which was quite some time ago. But I do, I love children. I worked at a Learning Center, Meadowvale Learning Center, when I was younger and I work with infants and toddlers. I love working with children, watching them, navigate through different tasks and they sense of accomplishment.
 Compliment that they feel when they've mastered those tasks.
transcripts.q4: I live in McDonough Georgia which is 30 2530 up code and up to 15 miles.
transcripts.q5: My availability is that I'm open to all shifts. However, I would prefer a morning shifts, if possible early morning, shifts if possible.
transcripts.q6: If there's a conflict between two children, the first thing that I would do would be to separate the children, and then to sit them down and calmly. Listen to whatever the issue may be and then see how I could offer some sort of resolution to the children.
transcripts.q7: I would make a great up kid teacher because I am very dependable, I'm loyal. I love children. I love working as a part of a team.
